title: orthurus
intro: Orthurus, also known as Bear's Breech or Lords and Ladies, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Herbal preparations of Orthurus often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
